entity.label: Zalmon
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A wood near Shechem, from which Abimelech and his party brought boughs and “put them to the hold” of Shechem, “and set the hold on fire” (Judg. 9:48). Probably the southern peak of Gerizim, now called Jebel Sulman.

nodes.label: Zalmon
nodes.description: A wood near Shechem, from which Abimelech and his party brought boughs and “put them to the hold” of Shechem, “and set the hold on fire” (Judg. 9:48). Probably the southern peak of Gerizim, now called Jebel Sulman.

verses.text: When the Almighty scattered kings in it, it was white as snow in Salmon.
